summary: Implemented L4b: made the L2 tech-pack library persistent+writable in src/config/tech-packs.ts — registerPack upserts approved packs into ~/.mermaid-collab/tech-packs.json (env-overridable, fail-soft reads), listPacks returns merged seed+stored (stored overrides seed), and resolveTechPacks now reads the merged library so a registered pack resolves cross-project. Seed const intact. 16 tests pass (new + existing tech-packs.test.ts); tsc clean for change-set.
